mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_team (team_id, activity_id, product_id, leader_user_id, required_people, current_people, status, group_buy_price, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{activityId}, #{productId}, #{leaderUserId}, #{requiredPeople}, #{currentPeople}, #{status}, #{groupBuyPrice}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_team SET current_people = current_people + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
UPDATE group_buy_team SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
UPDATE group_buy_team SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 0 AND end_time < NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_buy_team WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 0 AND end_time > NOW() ORDER BY current_people DESC, create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM group_buy_team ORDER BY create_time DESC
